description_long: This is a modern, compact airplane with a striking red and black color scheme, featuring a streamlined fuselage and a set of four prominent propellers mounted on the ends of its wings and tail. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection of the fuselage, with no visible dihedral or anhedral angle. The tail section is equipped with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a dark canopy that blends into the body. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or omitted in this depiction. The overall design suggests a lightweight, possibly electric or drone-like aircraft suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek red and black airplane with four propellers, straight mid-mounted wings, and a streamlined, enclosed cockpit at the front.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, four propellers, and the streamlined fuselage with a clear view of the tail and cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated top view highlighting the left-side propeller and wing, with the tail and cockpit still visible.
description_view_2: Another top-down perspective similar to view 0, emphasizing the symmetry of the wings and propellers.
description_view_3: Slightly rotated top view from the opposite side, focusing on the right-side propeller and wing, with the tail and cockpit in view.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four electric propellers mounted at the wingtips and tail ends.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
